sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 66

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 66:1
items.html: (to the question) For the matter of the recognition of a Nukva in the nine upper Sefirot, above Malchut, was rooted by the force of the ascent of the Hey Tachtona [lower Hey] into the Hey Rishona [first Hey], which is the secret of the association of the quality of mercy with judgment, made in the second Tzimtzum [restriction], as is known. Thus even after the second Tzimtzum, the force of the Tzimtzum did not rise above Bina, which is Ima. Therefore there is no recognition of a Nukva above AVI [Aba ve Ima] — only from Ima and below. (Item 1)
